note: The procedural memory of Cortex: what the agent can DO, not just know. Orient injects this catalogue at session start with <plugin> and <projectRoot> resolved to real paths. Rule of entry, no exceptions: generic (zero hardcoded values, parameterized), documented (README), proven (its test is green). A capability is read-only or reversible by default; autonomy never includes the irreversible (docs/CHEMIN.md).

capabilities.name: consolidate
capabilities.description: Read-only audit of a project's Cortex memory (.cortex/memory.md + guide.md): future dates, invalidation markers whose dead layer may remain, near-duplicate notes. JSON report with line numbers and hints.
capabilities.when: The memory feels contradictory or stale; before trusting old notes; as periodic hygiene after heavy memory growth.
capabilities.output: JSON report on stdout ({ findings[], counts, clean }); add --pretty for a human summary. Never modifies files.
